flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State University-San Bernardino rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-San Bernardino rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-San Bernardino fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-San Bernardino rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (18.7% → 25.4%).
